pageSubtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
noRoutines: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.

newRoutine.title: New routine
newRoutine.subtitle: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
newRoutine.advancedDeliveryHint: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
newRoutine.afterCreationHint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.

catchUpPolicyDescriptions.skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catchUpPolicyDescriptions.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

detail.defaultAgentRequired: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.
detail.saveSecretNow: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
detail.outOfDateDescription: This routine changed while you were editing. Reload to merge the latest revision before saving again.
detail.label: Label
detail.triggerSavedDescription: The routine cadence update was saved.
detail.routineChangedDescription: Someone else updated this routine. Reload to see the latest revision.
detail.defaultAgentRequiredBody: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.

signingModeDescriptions.bearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signingModeDescriptions.hmac_sha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
signingModeDescriptions.github_hmac: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
signingModeDescriptions.none: No authentication — the webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.

concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.coalesce_if_active: Keep one follow-up run queued while an active run is still working.
concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if several runs stack up.
concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.skip_if_active: Drop overlapping trigger occurrences while the routine is already active.

catchUpPolicyDescriptions.skip_missed: Ignore schedule windows that were missed while the routine or scheduler was paused.
catchUpPolicyDescriptions.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

toast.addFirstTrigger: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
toast.draftSaved: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.

runDialog.title: Run routine
runDialog.description: Choose the agent and optional project for this one run. Routine defaults are prefilled and won't be changed.
runDialog.defaultAgentRequired: Default agent required for this run.
runDialog.chooseWorkspace: Choose an existing workspace before running.

errors.runFailed: Paperclip could not start the routine run.

variablesEditor.detectedFromPlaceholders: Detected from `{{name}}` placeholders in the routine title and instructions.
variablesEditor.promptUser: Prompt the user for this value before each manual run.
variablesEditor.label: Label

variablesHelp.hintText: Use `{{variable_name}}` placeholders in the instructions to prompt for inputs when the routine runs.
variablesHelp.title: Routine variables
variablesHelp.description: How to prompt for inputs and which variables Paperclip fills in automatically.
variablesHelp.customVariablesIntro: Type {{placeholder}} anywhere in the title or instructions. Paperclip detects each placeholder, lists it under Variables, and prompts for a value before each run.
variablesHelp.namingRules: Names must start with a letter and may use letters, numbers, and underscores.
variablesHelp.typeRules: Pick a type (text, textarea, number, boolean, select), default value, and whether it is required.
variablesHelp.reuseRules: The same name reused across the title and instructions is treated as one variable.
variablesHelp.builtinIntro: These are filled in automatically — no setup needed and they will not appear in the Variables list.
variablesHelp.builtinDateDescription: Current date in YYYY-MM-DD format (UTC) at the time the routine runs.
variablesHelp.builtinTimestampDescription: Human-readable date and time (UTC) at the time the routine runs.
